## Problem

<!-- What's frustrating right now, or what can't you do today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A specific change or addition. Skill? Web UI page? MCP server? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could work? Why is this the right shape? -->

## Would it fit the LazyClaw model?

- [ ] Respects E2E encryption (no plaintext user data on the server)
- [ ] Fits one of: skill / channel / MCP server / web page / agent runtime change
- [ ] Not a bespoke integration better served by an existing skill or MCP
